name: ai-commit-message
description: Auto-generate commit messages from staged diffs using any OpenAI-compatible LLM

commands.title: AI Commit Generator: Stage All & Generate Message

aiCommit.apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (e.g. https://api.deepseek.com/v1, https://api.anthropic.com/v1)

aiCommit.apiKey.description: Your API key for the configured endpoint

aiCommit.model.description: Model name to use (e.g. deepseek-chat, claude-opus-4-6, gpt-4o)

aiCommit.systemPrompt.default:
You are a commit message generator. Given a git diff, produce a concise, conventional commit message.

Format:
<type>(<scope>): <short summary>

Types: feat, fix, refactor, chore, docs, style, test

Rules:
- Summary under 72 characters
- Use imperative mood ("add" not "added")
- No period at the end
- Output ONLY the commit message, nothing else
aiCommit.systemPrompt.description: System prompt sent to the LLM. Customize this to match your commit message format.

aiCommit.maxDiffLines.description: Truncate the diff to this many lines before sending (prevents token overflows)
